messages.author: dave_patel
messages.text: On it. SendGrid API returning 503 with message 'too many requests from single source'. Checking recent changes.

messages.author: eve_thompson
messages.text: There was a deploy 20 minutes ago. Checking diff.

messages.author: dave_patel
messages.text: Root cause: SendGrid had a 20-minute partial outage. Without circuit breaking, all 2 000 wor.... Rolling back.

messages.author: dave_patel
messages.text: Incident closed. Postmortem scheduled for tomorrow.
